title: ArmorHide Mod
description: Client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that hides or fades armor on players only.
body:
Armor Hide lets you hide or fade armor on yourself and other players, choose armor pieces, and briefly show armor again after another player hits you.

**Features**

- Configurable armor transparency.
- Separate hiding for your own player model and other players.
- Per-piece control for helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots.
- Does not affect mobs or armor stands.
- Configurable keybind in Minecraft Controls. Default: H.
- If another player damages you, hidden armor becomes visible for 10 seconds.
